metadata.title: Zapia — Digital infrastructure for professionals
metadata.description: Website, domain, email, cloud, VPN — we set up and manage your entire digital infrastructure from day one. Expert support included.

hero.headline: Everything your business needs,
hero.sub: Website, domain, email, cloud, VPN — we set everything up and manage it for you. Focus on your business, we handle the rest.
hero.selector_sub: Select your services — we'll handle the rest.
hero.trust_france: Hosted in France · EU data sovereignty

features.headline: One partner to
features.sub: From your domain to your VPN, we manage your entire digital infrastructure — so you never have to juggle multiple vendors or worry about technical setup.

items.title: Company website
items.description: Professional website designed, built and deployed by our team. Mobile-first, fast, and SEO-optimised from day one.

items.title: Domain name
items.description: We register and manage your domain. DNS, transfers, renewals — all handled without you lifting a finger.

items.title: Expert support
items.description: Real humans, not bots. Our experts are on hand whenever you need help — onboarding, troubleshooting, or just a question.

items.title: Security & backups
items.description: SSL certificates, firewall protection, and automatic daily backups. Your data stays safe and your services stay online.

items.title: Professional email
items.description: Custom email addresses at your domain (you@your-company.com). Reliable, spam-filtered, accessible from any device.

items.title: Cloud storage
items.description: Secure file storage and sharing for your team. Access your documents from anywhere, with automatic backups.

items.title: Collaboration suite
items.description: Video conferencing, shared documents, and team calendar — everything your team needs to work together efficiently.

items.title: Business VPN
items.description: Secure remote access for your team. Connect to your business resources safely from anywhere in the world.

performance.headline: Operational in
performance.sub: We take care of the entire setup so you can focus on running your business. No technical knowledge required on your end.

pricing.custom_desc: Website, email, cloud storage, collaboration tools, and VPN — set up and managed for you.

custom_features: Business VPN for your whole team

items.q: Do I need any technical knowledge?
items.a: Not at all. We handle the entire setup for you — from registering your domain to configuring your email and VPN. You just tell us what you need, and we take care of the rest.

items.q: How long does the setup take?
items.a: Most setups are completed within 48 hours. We start with a 30-minute call to understand your needs, then get everything configured and running as quickly as possible.

items.q: Can I pick only some services?
items.a: Absolutely. You choose what you need — whether that's just a website and email, or the full suite with cloud and VPN. You can also add services later as your business grows.

items.q: What if I already have some of these set up elsewhere?
items.a: No problem. We can migrate your existing domain, email, or website to our infrastructure, or simply manage what you already have. We'll find the best approach for your situation.
We send a clear invoice each billing period — monthly or yearly, depending on your plan. One invoice, one payment, no surprises.

items.q: Can I reach out if I need help?
items.a: Of course. You can contact us any time at contact@zapia.fr — we respond quickly and are always happy to help.

items.q: Why choose Zapia over Wix, WordPress, or Hostinger?
items.a: Those platforms give you tools — but leave all the work to you: building the site, managing plugins, keeping everything up to date. With Zapia, we handle everything from design to launch. Our websites look better, rank higher on search engines, and are often more affordable than a traditional agency. You get a single point of contact, a fully managed site, and ongoing support.

items.q: Can I be involved in the design of my website?
items.a: Absolutely — and we encourage it. Tell us what you need: contact form, payment gateway, onboarding flow, interactive map, product catalogue... We build your site from scratch, tailored to your brand and your goals. That's exactly what sets us apart: while Wix or WordPress offer generic templates, Zapia creates something unique — designed specifically for you.

cta.headline: Ready to get started?
cta.sub: Tell us what you need. We configure, set up, and train your team — so you can focus on your business from day one.
cta.trust_france: Hosted in France · EU data sovereignty

footer.tagline: Your complete digital infrastructure, set up and managed by experts from day one.

onboarding.vpn_title: Does your team need secure remote access?
onboarding.vpn_info_body: A VPN (Virtual Private Network) encrypts your internet connection and lets your team access company resources safely from anywhere — home, a café, or abroad. Essential for remote work.
onboarding.support_title: Would your team benefit from on-call tech support?
onboarding.support_info_body: You and your team get a direct line to our experts for any tech question — setting up a new laptop, fixing a printer, sorting out software. Think of it as having an IT team on speed dial.
onboarding.support_yes: Yes, that would be a lifesaver
onboarding.passwords_title: How does your team manage passwords today?
onboarding.contact_sub: How would you prefer us to contact you?
onboarding.contact_error: Something went wrong. You can reach us directly:
onboarding.contact_phone_note: Phone numbers outside France will be contacted via WhatsApp.
onboarding.contact_privacy: No spam. We'll reach out within 24 hours.
onboarding.done_sub: We've received your setup request. Our team will reach out within 24 hours to get everything in motion.
onboarding.review_sub: Review your services and estimated pricing before we get in touch.
